mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN 1 END) AS expense_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN 1 END) AS income_count FROM transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND occurred_at < #{endAt}

SELECT t.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') AS category_name, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.type = #{type} AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} GROUP BY t.category_id, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.occurred_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'EXPENSE' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'INCOME' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.occurred_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.occurred_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'EXPENSE' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'INCOME' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.occurred_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT t.channel, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM transactions t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.type = 'EXPENSE' AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} GROUP BY t.channel ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT t.payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '已删除支付方式') AS payment_method_name, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0 WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.type = 'EXPENSE' AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} GROUP BY t.payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '已删除支付方式') ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT b.category_id, CASE WHEN b.category_id IS NULL THEN '整月总预算' ELSE COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') END AS category_name, b.amount AS budget_amount, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS used_amount, COUNT(t.id) AS transaction_count FROM budgets b LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = b.category_id AND c.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.user_id = b.user_id AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.type = 'EXPENSE' AND t.occurred_at >= #{startAt} AND t.occurred_at < #{endAt} AND (b.category_id IS NULL OR t.category_id = b.category_id) WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.deleted = 0 AND b.month = #{month} GROUP BY b.id, b.category_id, c.name, b.amount ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.category_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, used_amount DESC
